title: Client mislabels outbound xb-ref with receiver i64 instead of source UUID
description:
When crossbridge-client submits an issue, it labels the local outbound issue with xb-ref:<target_id> where target_id is the i64 returned in ServerResponse::Ok. The answer flow expects this label to be xb-ref:<source_uuid> so the receiver-side answer (which echoes back source_uuid) can locate the local outbound issue via find_issue_with_label.

Reproduction: see new e2e test crossbridge-e2e/tests/round_trip.rs::submit_then_answer_round_trip — answer step fails with 'no local issue with label xb-ref:<uuid>'.

Location: crossbridge-client/src/main.rs:123 — currently:
    db.add_label(issue.id, &labels::ref_label(&target_id.to_string()))?;
should likely be:
    db.add_label(issue.id, &labels::ref_label(&source_uuid))?;
(source_uuid being the local UUID we sent in SubmitIssue.source_uuid).

Discovered while implementing #17 (E2E integration test).
